prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别约为4517名、4859名、4491名、7238名、6942名。2021–2023年位次基本稳定在4500–4900名区间，2024年因福建省实行'物化绑定'新高考选科模式，不限选科专业组（W999）位次骤降至7238名，2025年小幅回升至6942名，近两年呈现先降后稳的走势；该校在福建省物理类招生计划2021–2024年稳定在119人，2025年略降至117人，2026年（据招生计划文件）回升至120人，较2025年扩招约2.6%。扩招意味着录取名额增加，对位次有轻微后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安电子科技大学为211工程、国家'双一流'建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第39–41名区间（2026年位列第39名），属于国内顶尖电子信息类高校，层次稳固；该校在抖音平台热度评级为'较热'，总排名第60位，短视频曝光以'顶级211的压迫感''IT领域之王'等正面标签为主，反映社会关注度较高。声誉方面，2022年曾出现学术不端相关负面事件，2025年有校园霸凌舆情，但整体影响有限，未出现大规模报考信心动摇；第五轮学科评估中，信息与通信工程、电子科学与技术获评A+，计算机科学与技术、网络空间安全获评A，机械工程获评A-。这些王牌学科与当前社会高热度的计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业高度吻合，对高分考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信类持续处于'高热推荐'状态，电气工程及其自动化亦为'高热推荐'，与西电核心优势专业高度匹配，预计将继续吸引大量优质生源报考。福建省物理类考生数从2021年约11.7万人持续增长至2025年约19.2万人，2026年总考生约26.79万人，按近年物理类占比约76%估算，物理类考生约20.4万人，考生规模扩大加剧了整体竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次6942名、2026年扩招约2.6%、西电王牌专业（电子、通信、计算机）持续高热吸引优质生源、福建省物理类考生规模扩大等因素，判断2026年录取位次。扩招带来的位次后移压力被专业热度和物化绑定政策稳定后的回升趋势部分抵消，预计最低录取位次约6999名，波动区间6499–7499名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（创新实验班）/ 电子信息类（卓越计划实验班）/ 计算机类（创新实验班）
- 电子信息类（集成电路）
- 电子信息类（通信）/ 电子信息类（电子工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、软件工程）
- 计算机类（智能）（含人工智能、智能科学与技术）
- 计算机类（网络安全）（含信息安全、网络空间安全）
- 电子信息类（电子科学、信息物理、空天信息）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 自动化类（智能制造及智能测控）
- 管理科学与工程类（数字化与商务智能融合培养）
- 数学类（数学、统计与信息、计算机科学深度融合培养）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间6499–7499名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业（创新实验班/集成电路/通信）作为冲刺、三档专业作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如6500名以内）可重点冲击一档电子信息类创新实验班和计算机类创新实验班；位次接近区间上限（如7400名左右）建议优先考虑三档专业以确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 4517, 4859, 4491, 7238, and 6942 respectively. Rankings were stable in the 4500–4900 range from 2021 to 2023. In 2024, due to Fujian Province's implementation of the 'Physics-Chemistry Binding' new college entrance examination subject selection model, the unrestricted subject group (W999) ranking dropped sharply to 7238, then slightly recovered to 6942 in 2025, showing a trend of first decline then stabilization in recent two years. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Fujian Province was stable at 119 from 2021 to 2024, slightly decreased to 117 in 2025, and is projected to increase to 120 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), an expansion of about 2.6% compared to 2025. Expansion means more admission slots, exerting slight downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xidian University is a 211 Project and national 'Double First-Class' construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable in the 39–41 range in recent years (ranked 39th in 2026), making it a top domestic electronic information university with a solid level. On the Douyin platform, its popularity rating is 'relatively hot', ranking 60th overall, with short video exposure featuring positive labels such as 'top 211's oppressive feeling' and 'king of IT field', reflecting high social attention. In terms of reputation, there was an academic misconduct incident in 2022 and a campus bullying incident in 2025, but overall impact is limited, with no large-scale decline in application confidence. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Information and Communication Engineering and Electronic Science and Technology were rated A+, Computer Science and Technology and Cyberspace Security were rated A, and Mechanical Engineering was rated A-. These flagship disciplines are highly aligned with currently popular fields like computer science and electronic information/communication, maintaining sustained appeal for high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that computer science, electronic information/communication majors remain in 'highly recommended' status, and Electrical Engineering and Automation is also 'highly recommended', highly matching Xidian's core advantageous majors, expected to continue attracting a large number of high-quality applicants. The number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province has grown from about 117,000 in 2021 to about 192,000 in 2025, with total candidates in 2026 about 267,900. Estimating the Physics Category proportion at about 76% in recent years, Physics Category candidates are about 204,000, with the expansion of candidate numbers intensifying overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6942, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 2.6%, the sustained high popularity of Xidian's flagship majors (electronics, communication, computer science) attracting high-quality applicants, and the expansion of Physics Category candidate numbers in Fujian Province, the 2026 admission ranking is determined. The downward pressure from expansion is partially offset by the recovery trend after the stabilization of major popularity and the Physics-Chemistry binding policy. The estimated minimum admission ranking is about 6999, with a fluctuation range of 6499–7499.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Experimental Class) / Electronic Information (Excellence Program Experimental Class) / Computer Science (Innovation Experimental Class)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuits)
- Electronic Information (Communication) / Electronic Information (Electronic Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Computer Science (Intelligent) (including Artificial Intelligence, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Computer Science (Cybersecurity) (including Information Security, Cyberspace Security)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Science, Information Physics, Aerospace Information).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Automation (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Measurement and Control)
- Management Science and Engineering (Digital and Business Intelligence Integrated Training)
- Mathematics (Deep Integration of Mathematics, Statistics and Information, Computer Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 6499–7499, it is recommended to use Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 flagship majors (Innovation Experimental Class/Integrated Circuits/Communication) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 6500), focus on reaching for Tier 1 Electronic Information Innovation Experimental Class and Computer Science Innovation Experimental Class; if the ranking is near the upper bound (e.g., around 7400), prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
